amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 56 — paragraph 2 — introductory part
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 56 — paragraph 2 — introductory part

## Text proposed by the Commission

2. The Board shall provide advice and assistance to the Commission in order to:

## Amendment of the European Parliament

2. The AI Office shall have a secretariat, and shall be adequately funded and staffed for the purpose of performing its tasks pursuant to this Regulation.
commission_text: 2. The Board shall provide advice and assistance to the Commission in order to:
parliament_text: 2. The AI Office shall have a secretariat, and shall be adequately funded and staffed for the purpose of performing its tasks pursuant to this Regulation.
